key_findings: 91,670 papers scanned via OpenAlex cursor pagination (2010-2026). 5,151 (5.6%) contain sovereignty-relevant signals.
LLM verification (Claude Haiku) classified 1,581 as Russia-framing, 2,131 as Ukraine-framing out of the signaled set.
Manual Stage 3 annotation of 1,605 papers confirmed 1,581 Russia-framing verdicts, yielding 98.3% LLM precision.
12 confirmed Q1 journals and 46 Q2 journals carry Russia-sovereignty framing for Crimea.
limitations: OpenAlex coverage depends on publisher metadata availability; some journals may be under-represented.
LLM verification uses abstract text only; full-text framing may differ.
Q1/Q2 journal rankings are based on Scimago Journal Rank at time of annotation.
